reason: Semantic render regression: Mermaid 11 parses spaced identifiers before `as` incorrectly in this sequence diagram, creating duplicate lifelines. Rewrite the figure with stable IDs without spaces and keep the human-readable labels on the right side of `as`.
regressionFlagsAppend: manual review: sequence alias regression with spaced identifiers before `as`; old Mermaid 3.0.9 rendered this legacy syntax, Mermaid 11.14.0 does not
